headline: RBC Capital Sees Eli Lilly’s (LLY) Retatrutide as Key Growth Driver despite Mixed Trial Results
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is included among the 15 Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Income. On March 19, RBC Capital said the overall tolerability and A1C reductions for Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY)’s retatrutide in the TRANSCEND-T2D-1 study came in worse than Mounjaro for type 2 diabetes patients. At the same time, weight loss […]

headline: Is Eli Lilly’s (LLY) Triple Agonist Breakthrough Quietly Redefining Its Obesity Investment Narrative?
summary: Eli Lilly recently reported positive topline Phase 3 results from TRANSCEND-T2D-1, showing that its investigational triple agonist retatrutide significantly lowered A1C and reduced body weight over 40 weeks in adults with early type 2 diabetes compared with placebo. By combining GIP, GLP-1 and glucagon receptor activity in a single weekly injection and delivering continued weight loss without a clear plateau at 40 weeks, retatrutide points to a potentially new class of cardiometabolic...
